source: Disk/time facade runtime backlog and disk-time-query-policy shared common prototype distilled into a shared-ownership readiness manifest
description: Pins the disk/time facade behavior families that must remain covered before disk-space and local-time orchestration delegate to shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Disk/time facade runtime shared ownership remains valid while disk-time-query-policy.json and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS facade tests continue to reference the same vectors, filesystem capability gates remain platform-owned, public facade error mapping is pinned for disk-space and local-time query failures, V2 two-query time setting and H10 single-query behavior are preserved or explicitly reconciled, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest runtime planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by runtime or fake-transport policy tests before production shared ownership.

notes: This readiness manifest is a shared ownership gate for disk/time query-planning behavior-family completeness only; disk-space model conversion, platform filesystem capability checks, public facade error mapping, and compile verification remain required before production disk/time runtime code moves to shared.
